title: erythroxylum impressum
intro: Erythroxylum impressum is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae, commonly known as the coca plant. The medicinal properties of Erythroxylum impressum are derived from its leaves, which contain alkaloids that have been used for centuries to treat various ailments, including altitude sickness and fatigue. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to increase oxygenation of the body, reduce inflammation, and improve cognitive function. Erythroxylum impressum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to enhance physical performance and endurance.
